footerDescription: Online exam and assessment platform for tutoring centers, schools, and teachers.
heroTitle1: Create exams, assign work, and grade
heroSubtitle: Kinder CRM helps tutoring centers, schools, and teachers manage question banks, build exams, assign work to students, and auto-grade — all in one workspace.
heroFeatureHeading: A complete exam platform for education
heroFeatureSubheading: From question banks to result reports — with {{productName}}.
heroFeatureQuestionBankDesc: 21 question types, organized by subject and topic, with draft → published workflow.
heroFeatureExamsDesc: Drag-and-drop questions, time limits, attempt limits, and basic anti-cheat settings.
heroFeatureStudentsDesc: Add students manually or import from Excel, assign exams within time windows.
heroFeatureGradingDesc: Auto-grade multiple choice, matching, and fill-in-the-blank; manual grading for essays.
heroFeatureOrganizationDesc: Invite teachers, assign Owner/Admin/Teacher/Student roles, switch workspaces.
heroFeatureBillingDesc: Free / Pro / Enterprise with student, exam, and question quotas. Stripe or bank transfer.
heroHowItWorksSubtitle: Get started in minutes — no complex setup required.
heroStep1Desc: Sign up and your organization workspace is created automatically.
heroStep2Desc: Create question banks, build exams, and add students.
heroStep3Desc: Assign exams to students, grade submissions, and view result reports.
heroPreviewRecentDescription: Track exam results in real time
heroBottomCtaSubtitle: Create a free account and try Kinder CRM today.

cookiePolicyPage.intro: {{product}} ({{siteUrl}}) uses cookies and similar browser storage to operate the online exam and assessment platform, maintain login sessions, remember interface preferences, and protect account security.
cookiePolicyPage.section1Body: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the site function reliably and improve your experience.
cookiePolicyPage.categoryEssential: Essential cookies — required for sign-in, security, and core Kinder CRM features.
cookiePolicyPage.categoryFunctional: Functional cookies — remember language, light/dark theme, and layout preferences.
cookiePolicyPage.section2Body: Below is a list of cookies set directly by Kinder CRM when you use the platform:

csrf.name: csrfSecret
csrf.purpose: Protect against CSRF attacks on mutating requests

theme.name: theme
theme.purpose: Remember light, dark, or system theme mode

layout.name: layout-style
layout.purpose: Remember sidebar layout preference in the admin area

cookiePolicyPage.section3Body: Some features may set cookies through third-party providers when you actively use that service:
cookiePolicyPage.thirdPartyStripe: Stripe — when paying for a subscription via Stripe Checkout, Stripe may set cookies for payment processing and fraud prevention.
cookiePolicyPage.section4Body: You can control and delete cookies through your browser settings. Please note:
cookiePolicyPage.manageBrowser: Each browser (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge, etc.) has its own cookie and site data settings.
cookiePolicyPage.manageEssential: Disabling essential cookies may prevent sign-in or use of LMS features.
cookiePolicyPage.section5Body: Information collected via cookies may relate to personal data. See our <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink> for more details.
cookiePolicyPage.section6Body: We may update this cookie policy when adding features or changing technology. The new version will be posted on this page with the update date.
cookiePolicyPage.section7Body: If you have questions about {{product}}'s cookie policy, visit {{siteUrl}} or contact us through the platform's official support channels.

privacyPolicyPage.intro: This privacy policy describes how {{product}} ({{siteUrl}}) collects, uses, stores, and protects personal data when you use the online exam and assessment platform.
privacyPolicyPage.section1Body: This policy applies to users who register for and use {{product}}, including:
privacyPolicyPage.audienceOwners: Organization owners and admins managing a workspace
privacyPolicyPage.audienceTeachers: Teachers who create exams, manage students, and assign work
privacyPolicyPage.audienceStudents: Students who take exams and view results
privacyPolicyPage.section2Body: Depending on your role and how you use the platform, we may process the following types of data:

account.purpose: Registration, sign-in, authentication, and session security

profile.purpose: Display user information within the workspace

organization.examples: Organization name, logo, member roles, invitations
organization.purpose: Operate multi-tenant architecture and role-based access

students.purpose: Manage student lists and assign exams

exam.examples: Answers, scores, time spent, uploaded files
exam.purpose: Deliver exams, grade submissions, and generate reports

logs.examples: Exam events (auto-save, submit), anti-cheat, audit logs
logs.purpose: Security, troubleshooting, and tracing important actions

billing.examples: Subscription plan, bank transfer receipts, Stripe payment data

privacyPolicyPage.section3Body: Data is used for the following purposes:
privacyPolicyPage.useService: Provide and operate question banks, exam builder, assignments, and the student portal
privacyPolicyPage.useGrade: Auto-grade and manually grade submissions, and generate result reports
privacyPolicyPage.useSecurity: Protect accounts, prevent cheating, and enforce security policies
privacyPolicyPage.useBilling: Manage subscription plans, quotas, and payments
privacyPolicyPage.useSupport: Support users and improve service quality
privacyPolicyPage.section4Body: We may share data with service providers necessary to operate the platform:
privacyPolicyPage.shareSupabase: Supabase — authentication (Auth), PostgreSQL database, and file storage
privacyPolicyPage.shareStripe: Stripe — card payment processing when you choose Stripe Checkout
privacyPolicyPage.shareHosting: Hosting provider (e.g. Vercel) — serving the web application
privacyPolicyPage.shareNoSell: We do not sell your personal data to third parties for marketing purposes.
privacyPolicyPage.section5Body: Data is retained for as long as needed to provide the service and meet legal obligations:
privacyPolicyPage.retentionAccount: Account data — until you request deletion or close your account (unless law requires longer retention)
privacyPolicyPage.retentionExam: Attempts and results — according to the policy of the organization that owns the workspace
privacyPolicyPage.retentionLogs: Technical logs — for a reasonable period for security and operations
privacyPolicyPage.section6Body: We apply appropriate technical and organizational measures, including:
privacyPolicyPage.securityAuth: Authentication via Supabase Auth and password hashing
privacyPolicyPage.securityRls: Row Level Security (RLS) on the database — each organization accesses only its own data
privacyPolicyPage.securityAccess: Role-based access control (Owner, Admin, Teacher, Student)
privacyPolicyPage.section7Body: Depending on applicable law, you may have the following rights:
privacyPolicyPage.rightAccess: Request access to personal data we hold about you
privacyPolicyPage.rightDelete: Request account or data deletion (where supported in the app)
privacyPolicyPage.rightWithdraw: Withdraw consent where processing is based on consent
privacyPolicyPage.rightContact: To exercise these rights, contact us through the platform's support channels. Students managed by an organization may need to contact their teacher or organization admin.
privacyPolicyPage.section8Body: Student information (name, email) is typically entered by teachers or educational organizations. Organizations are responsible for having a lawful basis to process student data and notifying parents/guardians when required.
privacyPolicyPage.section9Body: We use cookies and similar browser technologies. See our <cookieLink>Cookie Policy</cookieLink> for details.
privacyPolicyPage.section10Body: We may update this privacy policy when features change or legal requirements evolve. The new version will be posted on this page with the update date.
privacyPolicyPage.section11Body: If you have questions about {{product}}'s privacy policy, visit {{siteUrl}} or contact us through the platform's official support channels.

termsOfServicePage.intro: These Terms of Service («Terms») govern your access to and use of {{product}} at {{siteUrl}}. By registering an account or using the service, you agree to these Terms.
termsOfServicePage.section1Body: {{product}} is an online exam and assessment SaaS platform providing (depending on your plan) features including:
termsOfServicePage.serviceExams: Exam builder with time limits and attempt settings
termsOfServicePage.serviceAssign: Assigning exams to students within an organization
termsOfServicePage.serviceReports: Result reports and organization workspace management
termsOfServicePage.section2Body: When creating an account, you agree to:
termsOfServicePage.accountAccurate: Provide accurate, complete, and up-to-date information
termsOfServicePage.accountSecure: Keep login credentials secure and accept responsibility for activity under your account
termsOfServicePage.accountNotify: Notify us promptly if you detect unauthorized access
termsOfServicePage.section3Body: Each user may belong to one or more organizations (workspaces) with roles such as:
termsOfServicePage.roleOwner: Owner — owns and manages the organization, including billing and members
termsOfServicePage.roleAdmin: Admin — operational administration within assigned permissions
termsOfServicePage.roleTeacher: Teacher — creates content, manages students, and assigns exams
termsOfServicePage.roleStudent: Student — takes assigned exams and views their own results
termsOfServicePage.orgResponsibility: Owners and Admins are responsible for member conduct and Terms compliance when inviting members or adding students.
termsOfServicePage.useNoCheat: Cheat on exams, tamper with grading, or bypass anti-cheat mechanisms
termsOfServicePage.useNoAbuse: Attack, reverse engineer, spam, or overload infrastructure
termsOfServicePage.useContent: Upload content that infringes copyright, is offensive, or harmful
termsOfServicePage.section5Body: Some features and quotas (students, exams, questions) depend on your subscription plan:
termsOfServicePage.billingPlans: Free, Pro, and/or Enterprise — details shown in the organization's billing area
termsOfServicePage.billingQuota: When quota is exceeded, some create actions may be limited until you upgrade
termsOfServicePage.billingStripe: Stripe payments are subject to Stripe's terms
termsOfServicePage.billingTransfer: Bank transfer payments (if available) must be verified per our internal process
termsOfServicePage.billingChanges: We may adjust pricing or plan features; material changes will be communicated reasonably before taking effect.
termsOfServicePage.section6Body: Content ownership is allocated as follows:
termsOfServicePage.ipOrg: Organizations retain rights to questions, exams, and student data they create or import
termsOfServicePage.ipPlatform: {{product}} and platform components (software, UI, branding) remain our or our licensors' property
termsOfServicePage.section7Body: Educational organizations are responsible for having a lawful basis to collect and process student data on the platform, including notifying parents when required by law. See the Privacy Policy for data processing details.
termsOfServicePage.section8Body: To the extent permitted by law:
termsOfServicePage.disclaimerUptime: The service may be interrupted for maintenance, upgrades, or events beyond reasonable control
termsOfServicePage.disclaimerAccuracy: Auto-grading depends on exam configuration; teachers should review before publishing official results
termsOfServicePage.disclaimerAsIs: The service is provided «as is» without implied warranties of fitness for a particular purpose
termsOfServicePage.section9Body: To the extent permitted by law, {{product}} and its providers are not liable for indirect damages, data loss caused by user error, or damages exceeding fees paid for the service in the prior 12 months (if any).
termsOfServicePage.section10Body: These Terms remain in effect until terminated:
termsOfServicePage.terminationUser: You may stop using the service and request account deletion (where supported)
termsOfServicePage.terminationPlatform: We may suspend or terminate access if you violate these Terms or as required by law
termsOfServicePage.section11Body: These Terms are supplemented by our <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink> and <cookieLink>Cookie Policy</cookieLink>.
termsOfServicePage.section12Body: We may update these Terms when features or legal requirements change. Continued use after an update means you accept the new version.
termsOfServicePage.section13Body: These Terms are governed by the laws of Vietnam, unless mandatory law provides otherwise. Disputes will first be resolved through negotiation; failing that, competent courts in Vietnam shall have jurisdiction.
termsOfServicePage.section14Body: For questions about {{product}}'s Terms of Service, visit {{siteUrl}} or contact us through the platform's official support channels.

pricingPage.paymentNoteStripe: Pay in VND via Stripe (card) or bank transfer. After sign-up, go to Billing in your workspace to choose a plan and pay.
pricingPage.paymentNoteBank: Pay in VND via bank transfer. After sign-up, go to Billing in your workspace to submit proof and activate your plan.
pricingPage.orgNote: Plans apply per organization (workspace). One account can join multiple organizations — each manages its own plan. See <faqLink>FAQ</faqLink> for more.

free.description: Try the platform and start small — ideal for individual teachers.

pro.description: For tutoring centers and schools scaling up.

enterprise.description: Large scale with no basic quota limits.
enterprise.featurePriority: High quotas for the entire organization

faqPage.ctaHint: Didn't find your answer? Sign up for free or view pricing to get started with Kinder CRM.

gettingStarted.title: Getting started
gettingStarted.a1: Kinder CRM is an online exam and assessment SaaS platform for tutoring centers, schools, and teachers. You can manage question banks, build exams, assign work to students, and grade — all in one workspace.
gettingStarted.a2: Yes. The Free plan lets you start with set quotas for students, exams, and questions — ideal for trying the platform or small-scale use. See the Pricing page for details.
gettingStarted.a3: Sign up — the system automatically creates an organization (workspace) for you. Then add questions, build exams, add students, and assign work. No software installation required.
gettingStarted.a4: Each organization is an isolated space with its own data. One account can join multiple organizations (e.g. center A and school B). Subscription plans and quotas apply per organization.

exams.title: Exams & grading
exams.a1: Kinder CRM supports 21 question types including multiple choice, true/false, fill-in-the-blank, matching, ordering, essays, file upload, and more for online assessments.
exams.q2: How do I create and assign an exam?
exams.a2: Create a question bank → build an exam in the Exam Builder (drag-and-drop questions, set time limits) → publish the exam → assign it to students with a start/end time window.
exams.a3: Multiple choice, matching, fill-in-the-blank, and many other types are auto-graded when students submit. Essays and some open-ended types are manually graded by teachers in the Grading section.
exams.a4: Basic measures include logging exam events (tab switches, etc.), time limits, attempt limits, and auto-submit when time runs out. Details depend on each exam's configuration.

students.title: Students & team
students.a1: Teachers add students (by email) to the organization, then assign exams. Students sign in, go to «My Exams», start or resume attempts, and view results when allowed.
students.q2: Can I import students in bulk?
students.a2: Yes. In the Students section, import an Excel file with name and email columns to add many students at once (within your plan's quota).
students.q3: How do I invite teachers to my organization?
students.a3: Owners or Admins go to Members, invite by email, and assign a role (Admin, Teacher). Invitees receive a link valid for 7 days to join the workspace.

billing.title: Plans & billing
billing.q1: What payment methods do you accept?
billing.a1: Prices are shown in VND. You can pay via Stripe (card) or bank transfer (upload receipt), depending on configuration — in your organization's Billing section after sign-in.
billing.q2: How do I upgrade my plan?
billing.a2: The Owner goes to /home/billing, selects Pro or Enterprise, and pays via Stripe or bank transfer. The plan activates after successful Stripe payment or admin approval of a bank transfer receipt.
billing.a3: Each plan limits the maximum number of students, exams, and questions in an organization. When you're near the limit (≥80%), the dashboard shows a warning. Upgrade your plan to increase quotas.
